summary: Acts as a pure, passive data manager for multiple, concurrent session transcripts (the 'Public Ledger').

listensFor.summary: Creates a new, empty session transcript. If the name exists, a numeric suffix will be added.

name.description: An optional user-friendly name for the new session.

listensFor.summary: Updates the configuration of an existing session. Targets the session via the 'session' property (ID or name).

session.description: The ID or name of the session to update.

name.description: The new name for the session. Will be de-duplicated if necessary.

listensFor.summary: Deletes an entire session transcript. Targets the session via the 'session' property (ID or name).

session.description: The ID or name of the session to delete.

listensFor.summary: Posts a new entry to a specific session's ledger. Can be a text message or contain metadata for a UI component.

session.description: The ID or name of the target session.

messageId.description: An optional, pre-generated ID for the message. If not provided, one will be created.

afterMessageId.description: If provided, the new entry will be inserted directly after this message ID. If the ID is not found, it will be appended to the end.

listensFor.summary: Updates the raw content and metadata of an existing message. Targets the session via the 'session' property (ID or name).

session.description: The ID or name of the target session.

listensFor.summary: Deletes a single message from a session's ledger. Targets the session via the 'session' property (ID or name).

session.description: The ID or name of the session to delete.

listensFor.summary: Requests the formatted ledger content for a specific session. Used by agents to build context for a cognitive turn.
Sets the currently visible session in the main tabbed view. Targets the session via the 'session' property (ID or name).

session.description: The ID or name of the session to make active.

listensFor.summary: Sets which session name is currently being edited in the UI.
Sets which message is currently being edited in the UI and pre-loads its content.
Toggles the collapsed/expanded state for a single message.
Toggles the raw/parsed view for a single message.

publishes.summary: Broadcasts that a new message has been successfully posted to a session.

entry.description: The full LedgerEntry object that was added.

publishes.summary: Broadcasts that a message has been successfully deleted from a session.
Broadcasts that a session has been updated (e.g., a new message was posted).
Broadcasts that a session has been deleted, so other features can clean up their state.
Broadcasts the verified map of session IDs to their names. Can only be dispatched by the SessionFeature.

names.description: A map where the key is the session ID and the value is the session's name.

publishes.summary: [INTERNAL] Dispatched after all session transcripts have been loaded from disk.

payload_schema.description: A map of session IDs to Session objects.

private_envelopes.summary: The response envelope containing the formatted ledger content for an agent's cognitive cycle.
